form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr5) over 2600m at Addington, beaten 14 m by Spiritinthesky (3:19.60) in 4yo+ on April 4. Showed ability the run before when she won by a 0.5 m (Fr6) at this track (1:57.90) beating Harriet's Moment in 3yo+ FM on March 26 at $5.30. Leading contender and expected to atone.
